info.title: Firely Terminal - Cross platform FHIR command line tool
info.description:
The FHIR Command Line Tool.
            FHIR client, FHIR Package management,
            JSON-XML Conversion, Resource resolving, Bundling,
            Quality Control, Query Language, Package Publication
            Simplifier.net project access and synchronization,
            Validation, Bulk Validation, Snapshot generation.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: Firely Terminal - The FHIR command line tool
